title: WISE FISH — Methods of Separation Matcher
description: An interactive fishing-rod themed matching game where students match separation methods (red fish in Tank 1) with their descriptions (blue slips in Tank 2). Correct pairs lock green with confetti; wrong pairs shake and show a hint.
subject: Science
chapter: Chapter 9 — Methods of Separation in Everyday Life

gameRules.tank1: Red fish cards display method names — click to SELECT (hook) a fish
gameRules.tank2: Blue slip cards display descriptions — click to MATCH with selected fish
gameRules.correctMatch: Both cards lock in GREEN with confetti celebration + progress update
gameRules.wrongMatch: Selected fish shakes with shake animation and a contextual hint appears
gameRules.completion: Trophy overlay appears with stats (pairs, attempts, accuracy) when all matched
gameRules.reset: Reset button reshuffles Tank 2 slips and starts fresh

pairs.description: Custom pairs to override the default 11 separation method pairs

method.description: Method name shown on red fish in Tank 1

description.description: Description shown on blue slip in Tank 2

hint.description: Hint shown after a wrong attempt

emoji.description: Emoji icon shown beside the method name

color.description: Hex color for this pair's accent (unused in current UI but extensible)

showHints.description: Whether to show contextual hints after wrong answers

celebrationEffect.description: Type of celebration animation on correct match

defaultPairs.description: Larger particles picked by hand based on size, colour & shape
defaultPairs.hint: Think of picking stones from rice!

defaultPairs.description: Beating stalks on a log to separate grains from them
defaultPairs.hint: Farmers beat wheat stalks on a wooden log!

defaultPairs.description: Lighter husk blown away from heavier grains by wind or air
defaultPairs.hint: Use a bamboo soop (tray) in the direction of wind!

defaultPairs.description: Separating solids based on difference in size of particles
defaultPairs.hint: Flour passes through holes; bran stays on sieve!

defaultPairs.description: Liquid converts to vapour — used to get salt from seawater
defaultPairs.hint: Salt flats use sunlight to evaporate seawater!

defaultPairs.description: Heavier insoluble component settles at the bottom of liquid
defaultPairs.hint: Tea leaves settle at the bottom of your cup!

defaultPairs.description: Liquid removed by gently tilting vessel — separates oil & water
defaultPairs.hint: Tilt the vessel to pour off the clear water!

defaultPairs.description: Insoluble solids filtered as residue using filter paper or cloth
defaultPairs.hint: A tea strainer filters out tea leaves!

defaultPairs.description: Used to extract butter from curd using a churner (mathni)
defaultPairs.hint: Buttermilk is the liquid left after churning!

defaultPairs.description: Uses a magnet to separate magnetic from non-magnetic substances
defaultPairs.hint: Iron nails stick to a magnet, sawdust does not!

defaultPairs.description: Conversion of water vapour into its liquid state
defaultPairs.hint: Water droplets on a cold glass on a hot day!

agentUsageExamples.scenario: Default — full game with all 11 pairs and hints

toolCall.title: WISE FISH — Methods of Separation
toolCall.instructions_for_student: Click a red fish (method) then click the matching blue description to make a pair!

agentUsageExamples.scenario: Reduced set — only 5 pairs for a quick quiz

toolCall.title: Quick Match — 5 Methods

pairs.description: Picking by hand based on size, colour & shape
Lighter husk separated by blowing air or wind
Insoluble solids separated using filter paper
Extracts butter from curd using a churner
Uses a magnet to separate magnetic substances

toolCall.instructions_for_student: Can you match all 5 methods without any hints?

agentUsageExamples.scenario: Custom topic — any subject's matching game

toolCall.title: Custom Matcher

pairs.description: Process by which plants make food using sunlight
Process of releasing energy from glucose

toolCall.instructions_for_student: Match each term with its correct description!

animationInventory.waterFlow: Continuous horizontal scroll of shimmer lines in water background
animationInventory.bubble: Bubbles float upward and fade — ambient water effect
animationInventory.fishSwim: Gentle up-down sway on idle red fish cards
animationInventory.fishWiggle: Scale + rotate wiggle when a fish is selected/hooked
animationInventory.selectedGlow: Pulsing box-shadow glow in blue/orange on selected fish
animationInventory.wrongShake: Horizontal shake + rotation on wrong answer (0.7s)
animationInventory.correctPulse: Scale bounce + green ring pulse on correct match
animationInventory.hookDrop: Fishing hook drops in from top when fish is selected
animationInventory.confettiFall: Multi-colored confetti particles burst and fall on correct match
animationInventory.ripple: Expanding circle on fish click position
animationInventory.hintSlideIn: Hint box slides down after wrong answer
animationInventory.scorePopIn: Matched pair badge pops into the caught strip
animationInventory.trophy-appear: Trophy emoji scales in with rotation on game complete
animationInventory.shimmer: Opacity pulse on water lines and interactive elements

stateManagement.selectedFish: number | null — ID of currently selected red fish
stateManagement.matchedPairs: Set<number> — IDs of successfully matched pairs
stateManagement.wrongAnimId: number | null — ID of fish currently playing shake animation
stateManagement.correctAnimId: number | null — ID of pair currently playing success animation
stateManagement.hintId: number | null — ID of pair whose hint is currently visible
stateManagement.attempts: number — total click attempts for accuracy calculation
stateManagement.confetti: array — active confetti particles with position/color/id
stateManagement.gameComplete: boolean — whether all pairs are matched (shows trophy overlay)
stateManagement.shuffledSlips: Pair[] — Tank 2 descriptions in randomized order

accessibilityNotes.colorBlind: Green/red states also show text labels (MATCHED, HOOKED, ✓ DONE)
accessibilityNotes.scrollable: Both tanks are independently scrollable for small screens
accessibilityNotes.fontLoading: Poppins loaded from Google Fonts via @import in injected keyframes
